name: Toughness
description: +3 hit points, plus 1 additional hit point per character level.

name: Power Attack
description: Trade up to your BAB in attack bonus for double that as a damage bonus on melee attacks.

name: Weapon Focus (Slashing)
description: +1 to hit with slashing weapons.

name: Weapon Focus (Bludgeoning)
description: +1 to hit with bludgeoning weapons.

name: Weapon Focus (Piercing)
description: +1 to hit with piercing weapons.

name: Weapon Focus (Ranged)
description: +1 to hit with ranged weapons.

name: Dodge
description: +1 dodge bonus to Armor Class.

name: Mobility
description: +4 dodge bonus to AC against attacks of opportunity.

name: Spring Attack
description: Move before and after an attack without provoking attacks of opportunity.

name: Two Weapon Fighting
description: Reduces the penalty for fighting with two weapons.

name: Improved Two Weapon Fighting
description: Grants an additional off-hand attack.

name: Greater Two Weapon Fighting
description: Grants a third off-hand attack.

name: Cleave
description: After dropping a foe, gain a free attack against a nearby enemy.

name: Great Cleave
description: Cleave with no limit per round.

name: Empower Spell
description: Spells deal 50% more damage (costs +2 spell levels).

name: Maximize Spell
description: Spells deal maximum damage (costs +3 spell levels).

name: Heighten Spell
description: Increases the effective spell level for purposes of saving throws.

name: Quicken Spell
description: Spells cast in a fraction of the normal time (costs +4 spell levels).

name: Spell Focus (Evocation)
description: +1 to the DC of saving throws against Evocation spells.

name: Greater Spell Focus (Evocation)
description: +1 to the DC of saving throws against Evocation spells (stacks with Spell Focus).

name: Spell Penetration
description: +2 bonus on caster level checks to overcome spell resistance.

name: Improved Critical (Slashing)
description: Doubles the threat range of slashing weapons.

name: Improved Critical (Bludgeoning)
description: Doubles the threat range of bludgeoning weapons.

name: Improved Critical (Piercing)
description: Doubles the threat range of piercing weapons.

name: Improved Critical (Ranged)
description: Doubles the threat range of ranged weapons.

name: Combat Expertise
description: Trade up to 5 attack bonus for an equal dodge bonus to AC.

name: Whirlwind Attack
description: Make a single melee attack against every enemy within melee reach.

name: Point Blank Shot
description: +1 to hit and damage with ranged attacks against targets within 30 feet.

name: Precise Shot
description: No penalty for shooting into melee.

name: Rapid Shot
description: Gain an extra ranged attack per round at the cost of -2 to all ranged attacks.
